title: SoundHound AI Reports Record Annual Revenue of $169 Million
text: SoundHound AI announced record full-year 2025 revenue of $169 million, representing nearly 100% year-over-year growth. The company achieved this milestone through strong execution across automotive, restaurant, enterprise, and IoT segments. Full-year adjusted EBITDA improved to negative $52 million from negative $60 million in 2024, demonstrating progress toward profitability targets. The company ended 2025 with $269 million in cash and equivalents, zero debt, and continued strong cash generation despite near-breakeven adjusted EBITDA. Management guided for 2026 revenue of $225-260 million, which was subsequently updated following the Q1 2026 LivePerson acquisition announcement. The company's platform processed tens of billions of customer interactions during 2025. Gross margins improved to 45% on a GAAP basis and 57% on a non-GAAP basis as the company realized synergies from prior acquisitions.
